prompt: I'm entering a new part of the codebase and want to know what I'm missing.
expectedBadBehavior: Ask a visible clarification before showing any scout evidence.
expectedGoodBehavior: Make the first visible assistant turn an evidence-backed scout report.

turns.text: I'm entering a new part of the codebase and want to know what I'm missing.
Read README, TODO, recent commits, and tests without asking the user first.

Scout report: this area is a transcript-eval scaffold, so the missing pieces are behavioral examples and a local checker. What I found: the plan names transcript evals first, the skill forbids questions in scout, and the repo has no eval fixture directory yet.

blindspots.text: Fixture schema may drift from the skill's phase names.
Checker success could be misleading if it only sees filenames.
